creator: jason.mann@protonmail.com
text:
The shells/zsh port fails to build, using a freshly obtained ports snapshot (using portsnap).

Two dependencies are built and installed, libtool-2.4.2 and libiconv-1.13.1_1, then upon returning to the build of zsh, it fails with:


===>   Registering installation for libiconv-1.13.1_1
===>   Returning to build of zsh-4.3.15_1
Error: shared library "iconv.3" does not exist
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/shells/zsh.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/shells/zsh.


This system had no ports installed before attempting this.  It was a fresh 9.0-RELEASE installation.

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to install shells/zsh port.
